name: Sci-Fi HUD
description: A heads-up display overlay: reticles, targeting brackets, status readouts, a minimap/radar, and animated telemetry, all in a holographic neon-on-transparent style anchored to screen edges. Diegetic, non-obstructive, with bracketed corners and grid lines.

requiredElements.name: reticle
requiredElements.description: A central reticle/crosshair indicating focus or aim.

requiredElements.name: targeting-brackets
requiredElements.description: L-shaped corner brackets that frame targets or panels, not full rectangles.

requiredElements.name: status-readouts
requiredElements.description: Edge-anchored status readouts (hull/shields/velocity) in monospace, updated live.

requiredElements.name: minimap-radar
requiredElements.description: A radar/minimap element with a sweeping rotation animation and blips.

requiredElements.name: edge-anchored
requiredElements.description: HUD elements anchored to screen edges/corners, leaving the center view clear.

requiredElements.name: holo-palette
requiredElements.description: A holographic palette (cyan/green neon) on a translucent/transparent base, not opaque panels.

optionalElements.name: scan-sweep
optionalElements.description: A radar sweep line rotating continuously.

optionalElements.name: damage-indicators
optionalElements.description: Directional damage indicators flashing on hit.

optionalElements.name: compass-strip
optionalElements.description: A top compass strip showing heading.

qualityRules.description: Center of the view is kept clear of obstructive HUD.
Status readouts are glanceable (size/contrast) without focus shift.
Corner brackets and thin lines convey the sci-fi diegetic look.
Line weights, glow, and corner style consistent across all HUD elements.
Readout text >=4.5:1 contrast against the (variable) scene behind.
Radar sweep and live values animate smoothly.
Animations don't strobe or obscure gameplay.
HUD is a fixed overlay (position fixed) above the scene, pointer-events none except interactive widgets.
Glow/scanlines composited via transform/opacity, cheap to render.
HUD color/glow tokens as CSS vars.

antiPatterns.description: Opaque HUD panels block the view; HUD should be translucent/edge-anchored.
Placing readouts/widgets in the screen center obstructs the view.
Fast strobing animations are distracting and inaccessible.
Full rectangle frames around everything looks like a normal UI, not a diegetic HUD.

improvementSuggestions.description: Add a top compass strip for spatial awareness.

exampleOutputs.label: Edge-anchored HUD overlay
exampleOutputs.snippet: HULL 87%

references.title: Diegetic HUD design in sci-fi games
references.author: Various UI artists
